common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.permissionDenied: You do not have access to this.
common.comingSoon: This area will be built in a later phase.

auth.subtitle: Sign in to continue
auth.secure: You’ll continue to the secure identity service to sign in.
auth.invite: Access is by invitation only · authentication is handled by the central identity service.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please log in again.

notif.title: Notifications
notif.emptyBody: New notifications about your topics, meetings, and actions will appear here.

state.emptyBody: Items will appear here once they are created.

dashboard.title: Committee dashboard
dashboard.placeholder: Role-tailored widgets will appear here as modules are built.

admin.title: Administration
admin.subtitle: Users, roles, and committee membership

kc.title: Roles are read-only
kc.note: committee roles are sourced from Keycloak claims. ACMP does not create accounts or edit roles — there is no self-registration. Membership and voting eligibility are managed here.

admin.assignmentsHint: Topic and action assignments appear here once those modules ship.
admin.emptyBody: Members appear here after they first sign in through Keycloak.

empty.title: No topics match these filters
empty.body: No backlog items match the current filters. Clear the filters or submit a new topic to get started.

error.title: Couldn’t load the backlog
error.body: The service is temporarily unavailable. Your filters are saved — retry in a moment.

shell.title: View coming soon
shell.body: This backlog view isn’t available yet.

submit.title: Submit a topic
submit.subtitle: Provide enough context for the committee to triage and schedule.
submit.autosaveNote: Draft saves automatically on this device as you type.
submit.submitError: Couldn’t submit the topic. Check the form and try again.
submit.fTitleHelp: Be specific — this appears in the backlog and agenda.
submit.fTitlePh: e.g. Adopt Keycloak as the standard IdP
submit.fDescriptionPh: Describe the proposed change and its scope…
submit.fStreamsPh: Type a stream and press Enter…
submit.fSystemsPh: Type a system and press Enter…
submit.dropHint: PDF, PNG, SVG, DOCX · up to 50 MB
submit.guardBody: This topic hasn’t been submitted to the committee. Your draft is saved on this device, so you can finish it later.

sec.typeHelp: Classify the request and give it a clear, specific title.
sec.justificationHelp: Explain the problem and why the committee should act.
sec.scopeHelp: Tag the streams and systems this topic touches.
sec.attachmentsHelp: Add evaluations, diagrams, or supporting documents.

typeDesc.ArchitectureDecision: A technical decision needing committee approval

urgencyDesc.Urgent: Blocks delivery or has a hard deadline

err.title: Title is required.
err.titleLong: Title must be 120 characters or fewer.
err.streams: Add at least one affected stream.
err.fileSize: Each file must be {{max}} MB or smaller.

detail.notFoundBody: This topic doesn’t exist or may have been removed.
detail.noComments: No comments yet. Start the discussion.

rel.title: Relationships
rel.emptyBody: Decisions, ADRs, actions, and risks will appear here as they’re linked to this topic in later phases.
